plan.failureSummary: The automation failed to find the 'Last Name' field while running in DETERMINISTIC mode, as the page structure has changed to a different question set ('Set 2').
observedIndicators: Failure screenshot shows 'Set 2' and different fields than expected (Last Name is missing)
Historical pass rate of 58% with alternating success/failure patterns suggests dynamic UI content

remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache for this test and retry. This will force the autonomous agent to re-analyze the page and identify the current set of survey fields.

plan.notes: The application appears to rotate between different sets of survey questions (the screenshot shows a 'Set 2' badge). The deterministic cache contains instructions for a different set (likely 'Set 1' or 'Set 3') which includes a 'Last Name' field that is absent in the current view. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to adapt to the current fields.
